# @iruka-edu/game-core

Core bridge & contracts for Iruka Game Hub (iFrame-only). No Phaser/React dependencies.

## Installation

```bash
# Configure GitHub Packages registry
echo "@iruka-edu:registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com" >> .npmrc

# Install
pnpm add @iruka-edu/game-core
```

## Usage

### Game Side (inside iframe)

```typescript
import { createIframeBridge, type HubCommand } from "@iruka-edu/game-core";

const bridge = createIframeBridge((cmd: HubCommand) => {
  switch (cmd.type) {
    case "INIT":
      console.log("Context:", cmd.payload);
      break;
    case "START":
      startGame();
      break;
    case "PAUSE":
      pauseGame();
      break;
  }
});

// Signal ready
bridge.ready(["score", "progress"]);

// Update score
bridge.score(100, 10);

// Complete game
bridge.complete({ score: 100, timeMs: 60000 });
```

### Hub Side (parent window)

```typescript
import {
  createHubBridge,
  type GameEvent,
  type LaunchContext,
} from "@iruka-edu/game-core";

const iframe = document.querySelector("iframe")!;
const hub = createHubBridge(
  { iframe, targetOrigin: "https://cdn.iruka.games" },
  (event: GameEvent) => {
    switch (event.type) {
      case "READY":
        hub.start();
        break;
      case "COMPLETE":
        console.log("Score:", event.payload.score);
        break;
    }
  }
);

// Initialize game
hub.init({
  sessionId: "123",
  gameId: "memory-game",
  locale: "vi",
  difficulty: "medium",
});
```

### Manifest Validation

```typescript
import { validateManifest } from "@iruka-edu/game-core";

const report = validateManifest({
  id: "memory-game",
  title: "Memory Match",
  version: "1.0.0",
  type: "memory",
  entryUrl: "./index.html",
  difficulty: ["easy", "medium"],
});

if (!report.ok) {
  console.error(report.errors);
}
```

### Result Normalization

```typescript
import { normalizeResult } from "@iruka-edu/game-core";

const { body, warnings } = normalizeResult(
  "quiz",
  { score: 80, correctCount: 8, totalQuestions: 10, durationMs: 30000 },
  { sessionId: "abc123", gameId: "quiz-1", locale: "vi" }
);

console.log(body);
// { attemptId: "abc123", score: 80, durationMs: 30000, completion: 1, accuracy: 0.8, resultPayload: {...} }
```

## Exports

| Module          | Description                         |
| --------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `contract`      | Types: GameManifest, GameType...    |
| `protocol`      | HubCommand, GameEvent, Envelope     |
| `bridge`        | createIframeBridge, createHubBridge |
| `manifest`      | validateManifest                    |
| `normalization` | normalizeResult                     |
